query: what's our open purchase order backlog by site?
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-procurement with maximo-overview as parent
Keys POs on SITEID + PONUM and excludes revision-history rows (status <> 'REVISD')
Resolves the open-status set via SYNONYMDOMAIN (DOMAINID='POSTATUS') rather than hard-coding literals
Excludes CLOSE/CAN and the REVISD revision-history rows, groups by site
